advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.

nutrition_support_routes: Enteral (NG, NJ, G, J, PEG, PEJ)

key_learnings: Completed foundational study of macronutrient science, micronutrient categories, and dietary reference intakes. Began study of clinical nutrition assessment methods including anthropometric, biochemical, clinical, and dietary (ABCD) assessment.
research_findings: Established baseline understanding of nutrient metabolism pathways for carbohydrates, proteins, and fats. Documented the 13 essential vitamins and 16 essential minerals with their primary metabolic roles.
current_focus_areas: Advancing through evidence-based nutrition practice guidelines; building clinical nutrition assessment competencies; developing expertise in medical nutrition therapy for major chronic disease categories.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Appointed Department Leader of the Clinical Nutrition & Metabolic Science department. Knowledge domains assigned from mind map covering enteral formula types, nutrition support routes, micronutrient deficiency assessment, protein requirements by condition, stress factors, metabolic calculations, complete mineral list, complete vitamin list, detailed macro calculations, supplementation protocols, nutritional assessment tools, calorie calculations, micronutrient needs, macronutrient requirements, and 7 standalone clinical topics. Reporting daily progress to Copilot (who reports to starrm1 on request). Progress: 0%.
Progress update: Completed macronutrient and micronutrient fundamentals and ABCD nutrition assessment framework. Initiated medical nutrition therapy study. Progress advanced to 10%.
